gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/65)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/65)
text: مَنْ أَذَاعَ عَلَيْنَا شَيْئاً مِنْ أَمْرِنَا فَهُوَ كَمَنْ قَتَلَنَا عَمْداً وَ لَمْ يَقْتُلْنَا خَطَأً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Husayn Bin Usman, from the one who informed him,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who publicises upon us<sup>asws</sup> something from our<sup>asws</sup> matters, so he is like the one who killed us<sup>asws</sup> deliberately, and did not kill us<sup>asws</sup> erroneously’.
en.sarwar: 9. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Husayn ibn ‘Uthman from those who reported to him from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Whoever publicizes our (confidential) cause is like one who murders us on purpose, and not by mistake.’”
